docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-07-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-06-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF NICHOLAS DAVID MARAIS APPEARED.
